name: Euro Short-Term Rate (€STR)
description_short: Daily data on the €STR (Euro Short-Term Rate), the ECB's benchmark overnight interest rate for the euro area that replaced EONIA in 2022. Based on actual transactions in the unsecured overnight market.
use_cases: How has €STR evolved since its introduction?
What is the spread between €STR and the ECB deposit facility rate?
How does €STR compare to the pre-2022 EONIA level?
